code_fixed_errors.issue: ZeroDivisionError in plot_distributions when num_cols is empty
code_fixed_errors.solution: Added check for empty num_cols before plotting and ensured n_cols >= 1
code_fixed_errors.impact: Prevents crashes when no numeric columns are found

code_fixed_errors.solution: Changed from dtype checking to pd.api.types.is_numeric_dtype() for better accuracy
code_fixed_errors.impact: Better detection of numeric columns including derived variables

code_fixed_errors.issue: Missing error handling for empty num_cols in multiple functions
code_fixed_errors.solution: Added checks in outlier detection, correlation analysis, MI calculation, and adversarial validation
code_fixed_errors.impact: Prevents errors when processing datasets with no numeric columns

manual_data_fixes.description: Diastolic pressure cannot be greater than systolic pressure (physiologically impossible)
manual_data_fixes.suggested_fix: Review flagged records in artifacts/eda/flagged_records.csv and correct or remove invalid records
manual_data_fixes.impact: 1234 records (1.76%) have invalid blood pressure values

manual_data_fixes.description: Extremely high systolic blood pressure (may indicate measurement error or critical condition)
manual_data_fixes.action_required: Review and verify with medical team
manual_data_fixes.suggested_fix: Flag for medical review or remove if confirmed measurement error

manual_data_fixes.description: Extremely low diastolic blood pressure (may indicate measurement error or critical condition)
manual_data_fixes.action_required: Review and verify with medical team
manual_data_fixes.suggested_fix: Flag for medical review or remove if confirmed measurement error

outlier_handling.description: Height values outside reasonable range [100, 220] cm: 30 records
outlier_handling.recommendation: Cap height values at [100, 220] cm or remove extreme outliers
outlier_handling.rationale: Height outside this range is physiologically unlikely for adults

outlier_handling.description: Weight values outside reasonable range [30, 200] kg: 7 records
outlier_handling.recommendation: Winsorize at 1st and 99th percentiles or cap at [30, 200] kg
outlier_handling.rationale: Extreme weights may indicate measurement errors

outlier_handling.description: Use IQR method for detection, then apply appropriate treatment
outlier_handling.recommendation:
1. Z-score method: Flag outliers with |z| > 4
2. IQR method: Flag values outside [Q1-1.5*IQR, Q3+1.5*IQR]
3. Treatment: Winsorization for extreme values, removal for impossible values
outlier_handling.rationale: Different features require different outlier handling strategies based on domain knowledge

other_recommendations.recommendation: [WARN] Derived variables should be created in feature_engineering.py. Consider: BMI x age interaction, pulse_pressure x cholesterol interaction
Review correlation matrix. Consider removing highly correlated features (corr > 0.9) to reduce multicollinearity
Monitor adversarial validation AUC. If AUC > 0.6, consider stratified sampling or time-based splitting
